title: Aurat Teri Yehi Kahani
subTitle: Savitri, a motherless girl, is forced to marry an elderly man for her family's sake. However, after her husband's sudden death, her life takes a turn for the worse.

title: BadKaar
subTitle: Mini, a young woman, is kidnapped from a pub and police investigate the case. However, when her sister sets out to find her, she uncovers a criminal nexus which shakes the city.

title: Meet Mere Man Ke
subTitle: Thakur Jagat Pratap Singh, a man from high society, falls in love with a courtesan, Jyoti, after she saves his life. However, the gulf in social status of the two prevents them from being together.

title: Aurat Teri Yehi Kahani
subTitle: Savitri, a motherless girl, is forced to marry an elderly man for her family's sake. However, after her husband's sudden death, her life takes a turn for the worse.

title: BadKaar
subTitle: Mini, a young woman, is kidnapped from a pub and police investigate the case. However, when her sister sets out to find her, she uncovers a criminal nexus which shakes the city.

title: Kohram
subTitle: Colonel Balbir Singh Sodhi assumes a disguise to unveil the true colours of Veer Bhadra Singh, a corrupt minister. Soon, Major Ajit teams up with him to execute the mission.

title: Qayamat
subTitle: Two close friends turn enemies when one becomes a criminal and the other, an IPS officer. Wronged by his friend, the criminal swears to take revenge once he returns from prison.

title: Tyagi
subTitle: Shankar, a good man, takes the blame when one of his brothers is accused of a murder. However, when he returns from jail, he realises that his brothers are trying to create a rift in the family.

title: Raju Ban Gaya Gentleman
subTitle: Renu helps Raju acquire a job in her company and later, they both fall in love with each other. However, things take a turn when his success makes him arrogant.

title: Nadaan
subTitle: Ranimaa's animosity towards a small community deepens when her niece and heir, Seema, falls in love with a man hailing from the same community.

title: Ram Rajya
subTitle: Lord Rama returns to Ayodhya with his wife Sita after defeating Ravana in an epic battle. However, he exiles his wife when people start doubting her purity.

title: Apna Bana Lo
subTitle: A gangster adopts a boy nicknamed Master and teaches him the criminal lifestyle. As Master grows up, he reaches a pivotal moment and decides to abandon his life of crime.

title: Bad Aur Badnaam
subTitle: Covert agents Ashwini Kumar and James turn hostile towards each other after a misunderstanding. However, they bury the hatchet and work together to thwart a sinister plan.

title: Abhimanyu
subTitle: Manu, a poor farmer, insists Pannalal to marry his sister, Tulsi, after he molests her. When he refuses, Manu resorts to a trick to avenge the insult.

title: Suhana Safar
subTitle: Enticed by his poetry, Sapna travels to India from the US to meet the poet Ujjwala. There, she meets a man, Sunil, who falls for her but he decides to help her meet Ujjwala.

title: Saveray Wali Gaadi
subTitle: In a bid to fulfil his love story and become a famous poet, Ravidas ventures out to the big city. His dreams seem close to becoming a reality when he saves the life of a newspaper publisher.

title: Bhrashtachar
subTitle: Journalist Bhavani intends to expose and bring to justice a corrupt politician who pretends to be a social worker. However, she soon finds herself trapped in a web of conspiracies.
